prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda LF-DE (2.0L DOHC 16V)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R turbine housing) and **HKS GT-SS intercooler** (50mm core thickness, 600x200x76mm dimensions) for optimized airflow in the Premacy's compact engine bay. Supporting mods include **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle 1.5 bar boost reliably.

Full **Cusco Type RS 4-point bolt-in roll cage** (PN: 602 540 A) with integrated **Sparco Pro2000 6-point harness bar** to stiffen the Premacy's unibody (increasing torsional rigidity by ~30%) while accommodating a **Recaro SR-7 Racing seat (FIA 8862-2009 certified)** for driver support under lateral G-forces.

Custom **Mazdaspeed6 (GG) 6-speed manual transmission swap** with **PPG close-ratio gears (2.66, 1.78, 1.30, 1.00, 0.79, 0.62)** and a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload)**. Clutch system upgraded to **Exedy Hyper Twin (ceramic/metallic, 240mm disc)** paired with a **Mazdaspeed flywheel (8.5kg lightweight)** for rapid rev-matching.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 (Pandem) widebody kit** (front fenders + rear quarter panels, +50mm per side) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (2x2 twill, 200gsm) to clear **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +30 ET, 5x114.3)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (245/40 R17)** for track-focused grip.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (OEM replacement, 50% weight reduction) with **custom NACA ducts** feeding the **HKS GT-SS intercooler** and **Mazdaspeed6 radiator (dual-core, 45mm thickness)**. Rear diffuser by **Tommy Kaira** (JDM-spec, 3D-printed ABS with integrated **Apexi N1 Evolution exhaust (76mm dual outlets)**).

**Full JDM Mazdaspeed aero package**: **Mazdaspeed3 (BL) front lip spoiler** (polyurethane, bolt-on) + **C-West rear wing (200mm chord, 3D carbon fiber)** with **adjustable aluminum mounts (0-15° angle)**. **Custom LED taillights (DRL-integrated, sequential turn signals)** by **V-Land** with **Smoked Lexan covers (30% tint)** for a stealth OEM+ look.
